hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md" ]; then cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md"; else echo 'No CLAUDE.md found in project root.'; fi
echo '⚠️ Context compacting. If action log exceeds 3000 words, consider proposing archive to HISTORY.md per the archiving protocol.'
cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf [/~.]|git push --force|git reset --hard'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected' >&2 && exit 2; fi
echo '📝 Code modified. Remember to update docs (update-docs skill) before shipping.'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then git_info="[$branch] "; fi; fi; printf "%s%s | %s" "$git_info" "$cwd" "$model"
